title: RSSB Librarian Recruitment 2025 Government Jobs in Rajasthan Apply Now
excerpt: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board has released a notification for the recruitment of 548 Librarian Grade III posts. Interested candidates can apply online from 05 March 2025 to 03 April 2025. The application fee is 600/- for General/OBC and 400/- for SC/ST.
value_prop: _Apply for **RSSB Librarian** government jobs in **Rajasthan** and get a chance to work with the **Rajasthan Staff Selection Board**
secondary_subtitle: _Get all the details about the **RSSB Librarian Recruitment 2025**, including eligibility, application process, and important dates

About Organization

The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board is a government organization responsible for recruiting candidates for various government jobs in Rajasthan, India.

The organization aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates and contribute to the development of the state.

About the Programme

The RSSB Librarian Grade III Recruitment 2025 is a government job opportunity for eligible candidates to work as librarians in various government institutions in Rajasthan, India.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to candidates who have the required qualifications and skills to work as librarians.
